function.rulebook_notes: Resolved entity via canonical cast record alias and searched project metadata by identifier, then read all matched canonical project records.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies the 3D printer as alias/entity.badger. Four project README.MD files include entity.badger in linked_entities, and their titles were returned sorted alphabetically.
